name: YouTube Transcript
description: Downloads and cleans YouTube video transcripts using yt-dlp with automatic deduplication. Falls back to Whisper transcription if no subtitles are available. Saves transcripts using the video title as filename.

findings_summary.notes: Subdirectory youtube-transcript/ confirmed in michalparkola/tapestry-skills-for-claude-code (253 stars, MIT). SKILL.md present. Requires yt-dlp installation for YouTube access. Optional Whisper fallback requires OpenAI Whisper (local model). Contacts YouTube servers to download VTT transcripts - standard web scraping pattern. No API keys required for basic functionality. No malicious code found.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
